note: Authoritative contract events the automated AFLRATINGS feed missed or got wrong. Each merges into the player timeline; when current=true it also corrects the player's displayed contract status/through-year (e.g. a re-signing that supersedes a stale free-agent tag). Add an entry whenever a gap is found and cite the official source (club site or AFL.com.au).

events.name: Jack Gunston
events.note: Left Hawthorn (211 games, 3 flags) as an unrestricted free agent to join Brisbane.

events.name: Jack Gunston
events.note: Traded back to Hawthorn after one season at Brisbane.

events.name: Jack Gunston
events.note: One-year deal for an 18th season (2027) after a career-best, All-Australian 2026.
